name: Home
window_name: MRZ LEGAL in Moscow — legal practice in economy.
document_name: MRZ LEGAL in Moscow — legal practice in economy.
meta_description: MRZ LEGAL — defender of the rights of entrepreneurs and companies in economic disputes. Practice of a law firm in Moscow, opening up opportunities of private law.

blocks.text_block_8: We support the business in achieving its goals. Modern, smart, and very “uncomfortable for rivals” legal company, that focuses on safeguarding interests related to economic activities.
blocks.text_block_9: For 18 years, we’ve been winning bankruptcy cases, resolving economic disputes, defending against subsidiary liability, and completing various legal projects with remarkable success.
blocks.text_block_10: The services provided by our solicitors are personalized legal solutions that eliminate any hindrances to profitability. By taking in the entire image, we refrain from following traditional actions and overcome any doubt, ultimately reaching our goal.
blocks.text_block_11: We provide a concise answer without unnecessary elements and words, often unique to our company’s practices and the entire legal market. In addition to competence, extensive experience, and a fresh perspective, our work involves comprehending people, economics, and individual businesses.
blocks.text_block_12: Any case we have is exceptional. It remains a secret, disclosed only to the trustee and concealed from others. We navigate both past and future to safeguard business in the present, all without inconveniencing you. The primary focus is time; do not divert your attention from financial matters.
blocks.text_block_13: We turn litigation investments into results for ordinary business people in complex legal disputes within the realms of banking and investment, real estate and trade, construction, manufacturing and energy, communications and IT. We’ll tell you directly what happens next. Millions of protected assets confirm the capabilities.
blocks.text_block_14: Regional projects hold significant importance for us. We are committed to boarding the first available flight, regardless of weather, to reach your desired location. Tasks may be spread across various cities in both western and eastern Russia at the same time. St. Petersburg, Sakhalin Island, and a casino in Sochi have already experienced the benefits of our solutions.
blocks.text_block_15: Your case is a privilege to us. We approach it not only with focus on the case itself, but also considering the individuals involved. We truly understand and prioritise the people behind every business, and as legal professionals, we always strive to protect both the person and the company.
